# Space Shooter

## Overview
Space Shooter is a 2D HTML5 Canvas web game built with Svelte and SvelteKit. It is available as a Progressive Web App (PWA) with full offline capability.

## Features
- **Gameplay**: 2D top-down space shooter mechanics with increasing difficulty.
- **Controls**:
  - Desktop: keyboard support (WASD or Arrow keys to move, Spacebar to shoot).
  - Mobile: touch and drag to move, automatic shooting.
- **Progressive Web App**: The game is cacheable via Service Workers and installable to devices using an included manifest.json.
- **Performance**: Optimized for zero zoom disruption and minimal latency on devices. Fully styled using Vanilla CSS metrics over a Canvas tag.

## Contact Information
- Created by: USPEKHI
- Developer website: https://uspekhi.web.app
- Contact email: mediatrends64@gmail.com
- Privacy policy: /privacy-policy.html
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## System Architecture
- Frontend: SvelteKit (TypeScript, HTML, CSS)
- Hosting: Firebase Hosting
- CI/CD & Deployments: Node/NPM + Firebase tooling
